title: Alpinion
description: [AI generated] Alpinion is a South Korean medical device company specializing in the development and manufacture of ultrasound imaging systems and transducers. Founded in 2010 as a spin-off from Samsung, the company serves healthcare providers globally, offering diagnostic ultrasound solutions for radiology, cardiology, and point-of-care applications. Alpinion is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea, and operates internationally across multiple markets.
